intro: A vast forge built into the volcano's flank roars with molten light. An old smith's tools lie ready - the lava here can temper an item into something far finer, if it does not crack first.
title: The Great Forge
description: Feed one of your held items into the lava and stoke the heat to temper it into something better. The hotter you push, the bigger the upgrade - but the finer the metal, the more likely it cracks. A truly masterwork item can be forged into a relic. If it cracks, only the slag is left.
query: How do you work the forge?

1.label: Temper gently
1.tooltip: (+) A modest upgrade (+1 rarity). (-) Low crack risk (rises with the item's rarity).
1.selected: You lay the item in the coals and work it slow and steady.

2.label: Stoke white-hot
2.tooltip: (+) A big upgrade (+2 rarity). (-) High crack risk (rises with the item's rarity).
2.selected: You crank the bellows and plunge the item into the white-hot core.

3.label: Leave the forge
3.selected: You leave the forge to its fire.

invalidSelection: That Pokemon has no item to forge.
tempered: The metal sings as it cools - the forge has tempered it into something finer!
cracked: A sharp crack rings out - the item shatters in the heat. Only a lump of slag is left to sell.
